student.research_summary: Undergraduate in Computer Science seeking research experience in machine learning and language models for healthcare and clinical text. Preferred areas include Machine Learning, Healthcare, Natural Language Processing. Current technical background includes Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn. Career goal: Research experience before applying to PhD programs.

faculty.name: Ana Marasovic
faculty.title: Assistant Professor
faculty.bio: Research interests in artificial intelligence with a focus on natural language processing.
faculty.research_text: artificial intelligence natural language processing language models reasoning text understanding

matches.rationale: Ana Marasovic is a good fit because their work in artificial intelligence with a focus on natural language processing aligns with the student's interests described in 'Undergraduate in Computer Science seeking research experience in machine learning and language models for healthcare and clinical text'. coffee_chat.subject: Undergraduate interested in your research
coffee_chat.body:
Dear Professor Marasovic,

My name is Maya Patel, and I am a junior majoring in Computer Science at the University of Utah. I am looking for undergraduate research experience in machine learning and language models for healthcare and clinical text. I was especially interested in your work because your profile highlights artificial intelligence with a focus on natural language processing. Would you be open to a short conversation about your research and how an undergraduate might get involved? My current background includes Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn, and I would be excited to contribute while continuing to learn.

Thank you for your time,
Maya Patel
